_meta.source: balancestudio.tv/allworks (single page, no pagination). Scraped 2026-07-07. 16 projects had rich sub-pages fetched; the rest use card-level metadata. Some titles were lowercased on the source page and are normalized here to Title Case.

works.title: EA Junior Club
works.service_categories: Promo Video, 2D Animation, Motion Graphics, Education
works.description: Series of animated characters representing different engineering professions bringing STEM to life for primary-school students, teachers and parents through the EA Junior Club program.

works.title: MILO — Energy and the Spirit to Success
works.service_categories: TVC, VFX, Post-Production, Food and Beverage
works.description: Creative post-production support for MILO Vietnam's latest campaign, developed in collaboration with Ogilvy Vietnam and SM Production.

works.title: Razer Leviathan V2 Pro
works.description: Product visualization for the Razer Leviathan V2 Pro — the world's first PC soundbar with head-tracking AI and adaptive beamforming, powered by THX Spatial Audio. Promotional 3D animation showcases the product's intelligent on-the-fly tracking for ultra-personalized 3D audio.

works.title: Canon PowerShot V1 and EOS R50 V
works.description: Canon's regional launch across South East Asia and South Asia of the new EOS R50 V and PowerShot V1 cameras. Built around the concept 'A Better Version of You — Take Your Content to New Heights'. Full video production, direction, sound and music design, photography, and post-production.

works.description: SkyLED visual partner for Sun Life's 'The Midnight Sun' Drone Show — Vietnam's first SkyLED-integrated aerial performance, held on New Year's Eve in Ho Chi Minh City. Combined 550 synchronized drones with cutting-edge SkyLED visuals.

works.title: Nord Anglia — Regional Events
works.description: Post production and creative direction for Nord Anglia Education's regional events.

works.title: Netflix — Yu Yu Hakusho
works.description: Collaborated with Jack Morton and Netflix on the red-carpet experience for the live-action Yu Yu Hakusho premiere in Tokyo. Pre-visualized and animated content for an 18-metre-high 360° platform using Unreal Engine, with an original soundtrack by Massive Music featuring artists from Sydney, Singapore, London and Amsterdam.

works.title: Changi Millionaire 2023
works.service_categories: Promo Video, Event & Experiences, 3D Animation, Automotive
works.description: Changi Airport's Millionaire 2023 campaign promoting consumer spending across 400+ retail outlets, with prizes of S$1 million or a Porsche Macan. Deployed across web, social, mobile, terminal screens, radio and TV.

works.title: Bold Sees the Bigger Picture — GIC
works.description: GIC's inaugural animated film, 'Bold Sees the Bigger Picture', narrating Singapore's reserve management journey from its early years to GIC's establishment. Collaboration with artist André Wee, director Dong Wun, Forsman & Bodenfors Singapore and Massive Music.

works.title: Clé de Peau Beauté — Immersive Room
works.description: Crafted an immersive experience for The Serum Reborn global launch with 3D projection mapping on walls, showcasing Clé de Peau Beauté's Sensor Proteins science through a multi-sensory journey for media and influencers.

works.title: The Gym — Valorant Tournament
works.description: Promo video and event visuals with 3D animation and VFX for The Gym's Valorant tournament.

works.title: Canon R5 Mark II & R1 Global Launch
works.description: Global APAC launch of Canon's revolutionary R1 and R5 Mark II cameras in collaboration with Paradox Media. Includes a launch video and an in-depth feature intro for the R5 Mark II, with 3D models of both cameras built entirely from scratch.

works.title: Canon Wireless Presenters
works.description: Promo with product visualization and 3D animation for Canon's wireless presenter products.

works.title: AIA Elite Secure Income
works.description: Fun narrative 2D animation showcasing the advantages of a diversified investment portfolio with AIA's first-in-market, capital-guaranteed investment-linked plan, the AIA Elite Secure Income. Worked alongside agency T.U.F.

works.description: Celebrates Dulux's Colour of the Year 2026 through three shades — Slow Swing, Mellow Flow and Free Groove — via a social-first TikTok and Facebook campaign rolled out on Jun Phạm's and Dulux's official channels, plus studio photography, color grading and VFX.
